title: Punjab and Haryana High Court protects lesbian couple facing threats from their families
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court passed directions to the Punjab Police to provide security to two women in a live-in relationship facing threats from their family members.In an order passed on May 22, Justice HS Grewal directed the Senior Superintendent of Police to ascertain the threat perception on the complaint and take steps to ensure the women’s safety from their family members who were opposed to their relationship.“Without commenting upon the status of live in relationship of the petiti
